seo_data.generated_keywords: POCO M7, Snapdragon 685, 7000mAh battery, 144Hz display, 50MP camera, 33W fast charging, 18W reverse charging, FHD+ display, IP64, Xiaomi HyperOS 2, expandable storage, Hi-Res Audio, Dolby Atmos, low blue light, flicker free
seo_data.meta_title: POCO M7: Massive 7000mAh Battery, Snapdragon 685, 144Hz Display
seo_data.meta_description: Experience the POCO M7 with its massive 7000mAh battery, powerful Snapdragon 685 processor, immersive 144Hz FHD+ display, and versatile 50MP AI camera. IP64 rated.
seo_data.seo_long_description:
The POCO M7 stands out with an ultra-long battery life, powered by a massive 7000mAh (typ) battery, making it POCO's largest smartphone battery for global markets to date. This ensures extended use for video playback, reading, and calling, complemented by 33W turbo charging and 18W reverse charging capabilities, allowing the device to act as a portable power bank. Its battery is engineered for longevity, maintaining 80% capacity after 1,600 charge cycles, and features a BatteryExtender Chip for strong performance even in low temperatures.

Beyond its enduring power, the POCO M7 features an immersive 6.9-inch FHD+ DotDisplay with a 144Hz AdaptiveSync refresh rate for smooth visuals and a 288Hz touch sampling rate for responsive interaction. It is powered by the efficient Snapdragon® 685 4G Mobile Platform, built on a 6nm process, ensuring stable performance with improved efficiency. The device supports up to 16GB RAM with memory extension and offers expandable storage up to 2TB, catering to extensive multitasking and storage needs. Photography is handled by a clear 50MP AI dual camera, while multiple eye-care certifications and IP64 water and dust resistance enhance user comfort and durability.

range_overview:
The POCO M7 is engineered to deliver an ultra-long battery life experience, featuring a massive 7000mAh (typ) battery, which is POCO's largest smartphone battery for global markets to date. This substantial power capacity supports up to 2.32 days of light daily use, 28 hours of video playback, or 46 hours of calling. Even at 1% power, it can still provide up to 64 minutes of calling or 10 hours of standby. The device supports 33W turbo charging for rapid power-ups and offers 18W reverse charging, effectively doubling as a portable power bank. Its battery system is enhanced with a BatteryExtender Chip for -20℃ performance and Smart Charging Engine 2.0 features like Zero Power Instant On and Battery Health 4.0, ensuring longevity and reliability even after 1,600 charge cycles.

Visuals come to life on the POCO M7's immersive 6.9-inch FHD+ DotDisplay, offering a resolution of 2340 × 1080 and a 374 PPI. The screen boasts a 9-level adaptive refresh rate of up to 144Hz for supported apps and a touch sampling rate of up to 288Hz, providing a smooth and responsive visual experience. With 700 nits (typ) brightness, 850 nits (HBM), and a 1400:1 contrast ratio, it delivers vibrant colors and wide viewing angles. Eye comfort is prioritized with DC dimming and TÜV Rheinland certifications for Low Blue Light (Software Solution), Flicker Free, and Circadian Friendly. Additionally, Wet Touch Technology 2.0 ensures accurate touch response even with wet or oily fingers.

Under the hood, the POCO M7 is driven by the powerful Snapdragon® 685 4G Mobile Platform, an octa-core chipset built on an efficient 6nm process, with a Qualcomm® Kryo™ CPU up to 2.8GHz and Qualcomm® Adreno™ GPU, ensuring stable performance and improved power efficiency. It offers flexible memory configurations of 6GB + 128GB or 8GB + 256GB, with seamless memory extension up to 16GB for enhanced multitasking and up to 2TB expandable storage via microSD. The device features a clear 50MP AI main camera with a 5P lens and f/1.8 aperture, supporting modes like Film Camera, HDR, Night mode, Portrait mode, and Time-lapse, capable of 1080p video recording at 30 fps. An 8MP front camera provides similar photo and video capabilities with an f/2 aperture.

The POCO M7 is designed for comfort with a quad-curved design and robust features including IP64 water and dust resistance. Security is handled by a side fingerprint sensor and AI face unlock. It supports Hi-Res Audio and Dolby Atmos® for an enhanced sound experience. Connectivity options include SIM1 + Hybrid (SIM or microSD), 2G, 3G, and 4G LTE, dual-band Wi-Fi (2.4GHz | 5GHz), Bluetooth 5.0, and NFC. Navigation is supported by GPS, Glonass, Galileo, and Beidou. The device runs on Xiaomi HyperOS 2, offering a promised 48-month like-new software experience.
sales_arguments: Massive 7000mAh (typ) battery for ultra-long usage, POCO's largest ever for global markets.
Powerful Snapdragon® 685 Processor built on an efficient 6nm process for stable and efficient performance.
Immersive 6.9” FHD+ DotDisplay with 144Hz AdaptiveSync refresh rate and eye-care certifications.
Versatile 50MP AI main camera and 8MP front camera for clear photos and videos.
Supports 33W turbo charging and 18W reverse charging, allowing it to double as a portable power bank.

technical_specifications.Display Features: Reading mode, DC dimming, Wet touch technology 2.0
technical_specifications.Eye-Care Certifications: TÜV Rheinland Low Blue Light (Software Solution) Certified, TÜV Rheinland Flicker Free Certified, TÜV Rheinland Circadian Friendly Certified
technical_specifications.Rear Camera Modes: Film Camera, HDR mode, Night mode, Portrait mode, Time-lapse
technical_specifications.Front Camera Modes: Film Camera, HDR mode, Soft-light ring, Portrait mode, Time-lapse
technical_specifications.Security: Side fingerprint sensor, AI face unlock
technical_specifications.Sensors: Virtual proximity sensor, Ambient light sensor, Accelerometer, Electronic compass, IR blaster
